title: Kenyan Corn Fritters
description: Crunchy corn fritters inspired by Kenyan street food, served with a side of tangy chutney.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the bread, corn, cilantro, baking powder, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the corn mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
Serve with a side of tangy chutney or your favorite dipping sauce.
